description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, these trendy sandals from catwalk make for a great addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette they looks great with all kinds of clothing.UpperThong style straps with a toe separatorElasticated band looping around the ankle for a snug FitTPR footbed referencing woodOutsoleDurable TPU outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot for absolute grip and tractionFloral lug at the heel for ergonomic comfort and styleSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
